angles.name: google_search
angles.template:
Most people in {location} search Google before visiting a local shop. If {business_name} has no website, they won't find you — they'll go to a competitor who does.

A simple site with your products, hours, and location costs less than a month of print advertising and works 24/7.

Would you be open to a quick call to talk about it?

angles.name: instagram_limits
angles.template:
I see {business_name} is active in {location} — but if you only rely on social media to reach customers, you're missing everyone who searches Google directly.

A website isn't about replacing your Instagram. It's about being findable when people aren't scrolling.

Happy to show you a few examples of local {category} sites I've built.

angles.name: catalog
angles.template:
Running a {category} business without a website means customers can't browse your products or check your hours unless they physically walk in or call. That's lost sales from people who just want to look first.

A basic site with your product catalog takes just a few days to build.

Worth a 5-minute chat?
